user.title: Singapore
user.description: Set up the Singapore integration. Optionally enter your SP Services credentials to enable household electricity and water usage sensors. Leave both fields blank to skip.

otp.title: SP Services Two-Factor Authentication
otp.description: An OTP has been sent to the mobile number registered for {username}. Enter it below to complete login.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate SP Services
reauth_confirm.description: Your SP Services session has expired. Re-enter your password for {username} to request a new OTP.

reauth_otp.title: SP Services Two-Factor Authentication
reauth_otp.description: Enter the OTP sent to your registered mobile number to complete re-authentication.

error.name_too_long: Name must be 64 characters or fewer.
error.credentials_incomplete: Please provide both a username and a password, or leave both blank.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid SP Services username or password.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to SP Services. Check your network and try again.
